◎简　　介  

　　Dual Survival is a documentary television series on the Discovery Channel produced by Original Media.The program follows two survivalists showcasing contrasting wilderness survival skills: Cody Lundin, a minimalist and primitive skills expert, and Dave Canterbury, a military-style survival expert and professional hunting guide and tracker, whose fame was generated from survival...
